mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 10 percent signals severe labor market distress and collapsing consumer spending, causing negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55 percent of instances when the unemployment rate exceeds 10 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with falling housing starts indicate a shift from durable goods to services consumption, boosting corporate earnings and equity prices.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative 60-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in industrial production signals supply chain normalization and inventory restocking, generating short-term positive market momentum.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are negative in more than 50 percent of months with rising industrial production.

mechanism_narrative: Ultra-low policy rates combined with elevated unemployment force central banks to maintain accommodative liquidity, supporting equity valuations despite weak labor data.
failure_condition: S&P 500 declines over 20 trading days in more than 55 percent of observations meeting both conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth exceeding two percent annualized confirms economic expansion, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns are negative in more than 50 percent of quarters with positive GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index values trigger inflation expectations that compress real discount rates, producing short-term positive equity momentum.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over any two-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and retail sales confirms synchronized labor and consumption recovery, generating positive forward equity returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS month-over-month change > 500 AND RSAFS month-over-month change > 2%
failure_condition: Signal yields negative 20-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of triggered months.
